name: Rice Crispies Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the syrup and sugar in a large bowl. Heat over medium, stirring constantly until it comes to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter until melted.
3. Pour the mixture over the Rice Crispies cereal and mix well to combine.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased square pan.
5. Spread chocolate chips and butterscotch chips evenly on top of the cereal.
6. Place under a broiler (toasting element) for about 2-3 minutes, or until the chocolate is melted and slightly bubbled.
7. Remove from the broiler immediately and spread the melted chocolate evenly over the top layer.
8. Allow to cool completely, then cut into bars.
Myrtle Reynolds
